title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at FreshToHome

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at FreshToHome
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with FreshToHome! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Raipur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About FreshToHome:
FreshToHome is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FreshToHome!
